title: a2a-envelope v0.1
description: Structured handoff envelope for the Agent Community Protocol. Replaces fragile mention-based handoffs with a machine-validatable, auditable format. Agents MUST append this as the final ```a2a-envelope v0.1 ... ``` block.

version.description: Envelope format version. Fixed for v0.1.

turn_id.description: Unique identifier for this turn (UUID4). Generated by the producing agent or runner.

from.description: The agent that produced this response. Must match the current speaker.

content.description: The human-readable reasoning or answer produced in this turn. The runner may strip the envelope block and store the clean text here.

to.description: Target agent for the next turn.

reason.description: Short justification for why this handoff is needed (e.g. 'needs code implementation', 'better at analysis').

oneOf.description: No handoff (use when done=true or when the agent is correcting itself).

handoff.description: Handoff directive. Mutually exclusive with done=true in a valid turn.

done.description: True when the council's objective is complete and no further handoff is required. Must be false if handoff is present.

correction_attempt.description: 0 on first attempt for this logical turn; 1 if the agent is self-correcting after a protocol violation in its previous output.

violations.description: Self-reported or detected protocol violations in this turn (e.g. 'self-handoff attempted'). Empty array when clean.

metadata.description: Optional rich metadata: confidence (0-1), token_estimate, timestamp, model, etc.

correlation_id.description: Optional cross-turn / cross-council correlation identifier for tracing related decisions.
